safety.ae_description: Perioral tingling and numbness (possible hypocalcemia), onset hours after Osteveda injection.
safety.pc_description: Prefilled syringe solution appeared cloudy and needle was bent; product used anyway.

compliance.off_label_correct_handling: Refer urgently to HCP/ER for hypocalcemia symptoms; MI does not manage clinically.

reveal_rules.cue: Persona volunteers up front the product complaint: cloudy solution and bent needle on the prefilled syringe.
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: lot number, expiration date, NDC, suspect product availability
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: trainee asks for lot/expiry/NDC and whether the product is still available

reveal_rules.cue: Persona volunteers offhand in beat 2: "and honestly I've felt a bit off since."
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: perioral tingling and numbness, onset hours after injection
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: trainee catches the volunteered 'felt off since' cue and clarifies it

common_failures.description: Handles the PC, lets the 'felt off since' cue pass without clarifying
Identifies both AE and PC but routes to only one department
